mapper.select: SELECT MEM_ID, BUY_NUM, SHOP_BUY.ITEM_NUM, BUY_CNT, ITEM_NAME, PRICE, BUY_CNT*PRICE AS TOTAL_PRICE, ATTACHED_IMG_NAME, BUY_DATE FROM SHOP_BUY LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM ON SHOP_BUY.ITEM_NUM = ITEM.ITEM_NUM INNER JOIN ITEM_IMG ON SHOP_BUY.ITEM_NUM = ITEM_IMG.ITEM_NUM WHERE IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND MEM_ID = #{memId} ORDER BY BUY_DATE DESC

SELECT BUY_NUM, SHOP_BUY.ITEM_NUM, MEM_ID, BUY_DATE, BUY_CNT, ORDER_NUM, ITEM_NAME, BUY_CNT*PRICE AS TOTAL_PRICE, SUM(BUY_CNT*PRICE) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE(BUY_DATE)) AS DAILY_TOTAL FROM SHOP_BUY INNER JOIN ITEM ON SHOP_BUY.ITEM_NUM = ITEM.ITEM_NUM ORDER BY BUY_DATE DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO shop_buy ( ITEM_NUM , MEM_ID , BUY_CNT , ORDER_NUM ) VALUES
( (SELECT ITEM_NUM FROM shop_cart WHERE CART_NUM = #{cartNum}) , #{memId} , (SELECT CART_CNT FROM shop_cart WHERE CART_NUM = #{cartNum}) , (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(ORDER_NUM), 0) + 1 FROM SHOP_BUY) )
